creator: pyrus@bsdmail.com
text:
Short description needs to mention that Coyim is an XMPP client. example => "Safe and secure by default XMPP chat client which uses Tor"

Long description needs those mentions, plus that it's written in Go. For example, =>

"CoyIM is an XMPP chat client that is safe and secure by default: no settings to change, no plugins to install, no computer configuration to change. Requires Tor and is written in Go."

Thank you
